docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ERIC BRODRICK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SUPERIOR COURT SANTA BARBARA COUNTY IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,000.00 FILED BY BRODRICK, ERIC AS TO DEFENDANT SUPERIOR COURT SANTA BARBARA COUNTY COLLECTIONS DIVISION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-08-2026 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-08-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $130.00 AS TO DEFENDANT SUPERIOR COURT SANTA BARBARA COUNTY COLLECTIONS DIVISION
SC-105 REQUEST*** FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER FILED BY DEFENDANT SUPERIOR COURT SANTA BARBARA COUNTY COLLECTIONS DIVISION
ORDER SC-105A - ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER IS MOOT. THE CASE HAS ALREADY BEEN DISMISSED.
